messages.content: Create a plan. I only have 8 hours a week so please keep it realistic.

project.title: Research Notes — Researcher Pivot
project.one_liner: A note-taking app with citation management and collaborative annotation for researchers
project.core_problem: Researchers lose context switching between Zotero, Google Docs, and annotation tools

success_criteria.criterion: 5 of 30 users annotate at least 10 papers in first 2 weeks
Retain 3 of initial 200 existing users as power users

scope_items.description: Inline annotation with highlights and notes
